tests.prompt: Create a landing page outline for Robinson's Remedies Lip Quench product
assertions: Output uses Robinson's Red (#E82028) for CTAs
Output uses Robinson's Blue (#2060A8) for body/headings
Output does NOT use red for body text
Output has sharp CTA corners (no border-radius on buttons)
Output does NOT contain em dashes
Output includes a hero section, benefits, social proof, and CTA sections
